changeSet.author: lims
changeSet.comment: WHO: Tracks specimen label print/reprint counts for chain-of-custody auditing.

changeSet.author: lims
changeSet.comment: Consumables inventory for phlebotomy / reception reorder workflows.

changeSet.author: lims
changeSet.comment: Seed baseline inventory aligned with lims-lab-workflow.js demo catalog.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO supplies (id, item_no, name, category, tube_color, current_stock, min_stock, max_stock, unit, last_restocked, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted, version) VALUES ('33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333330001', 'SUP-0001', 'EDTA purple tubes', 'Collection tubes', '#a855f7', 300, 150, 600, 'tubes', DATE '2026-05-05', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333330002', 'SUP-0002', 'SST gold tubes', 'Collection tubes', '#facc15', 300, 150, 600, 'tubes', DATE '2026-05-05', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333330003', 'SUP-0003', 'Sodium citrate blue tubes', 'Collection tubes', '#60a5fa', 120, 50, 240, 'tubes', DATE '2026-05-05', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333330004', 'SUP-0004', 'Lithium heparin green tubes', 'Collection tubes', '#22c55e', 120, 50, 240, 'tubes', DATE '2026-05-05', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333330005', 'SUP-0005', 'Sterile urine containers', 'Containers', '#fde047', 250, 100, 500, 'containers', DATE '2026-05-05', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333330006', 'SUP-0006', '21G needles', 'Phlebotomy', '#64748b', 250, 100, 500, 'needles', DATE '2026-05-05', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333330007', 'SUP-0007', 'Thermal barcode labels', 'Labelling', '#0ea5e9', 2500, 1000, 5000, 'labels', DATE '2026-05-05', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333330008', 'SUP-0008', 'Nitrile gloves', 'PPE', '#334155', 1200, 500, 2400, 'pairs', DATE '2026-05-05', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0) ON CONFLICT (item_no) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, category = EXCLUDED.category, tube_color = EXCLUDED.tube_color, current_stock = EXCLUDED.current_stock, min_stock = EXCLUDED.min_stock, max_stock = EXCLUDED.max_stock, unit = EXCLUDED.unit, last_restocked = EXCLUDED.last_restocked, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = 'system', is_deleted = false;
